title: lycium chilense var. comberi
intro: Lycium chilense var. comberi, also known as the Chilean boxthorn, is a plant species in the nightshade family, native to the Andes mountains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lycium chilense var. comberi include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially supporting cognitive function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
intro_study: According to "Yao xue xue bao = Acta pharmaceutica Sinica", Lycium chilense var. comberi benefits from its constituent LbGp2, which has distinct antioxidation effects, scavenging the superoxide anion effectively.
